value: has GroupName as alias syntax: 'target has EquipmentSlots as eq' lets you access fields via target.eq.field instead of target.EquipmentSlots.field. Cleaner when accessing multiple fields from the same optional group.

Optional group fields on entity type require target.GroupName.field_name access pattern (e.g., target.EquipmentSlots.wielded_main), not target.field_name directly. The has guard enables the access but doesn't flatten fields into entity scope.
